The Blackboard/Whiteboard in the background of the image shows a classroom with desks and computers. There are several people sitting at the desks, working on their laptops, and a few people standing around them. The desks are arranged in rows and the computers are on display. The room is well-lit with natural light coming in from the windows on the left side.
A group of people sitting at desks in an office.

The image shows a group of people working on computers in an office. There are several desks and chairs arranged in a neat and orderly manner. The desks are white and the chairs are black. The people are working on their laptops and appear to be focused on their work. The office has a large window on the left side of the image, allowing natural light to enter the space.
